A [[Gender/Legends|male]] '''[[Quarren/Legends|Quarren]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]]''' served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the final decades of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Quarren/Legends|Quarren]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] was [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] in [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and achieved the rank of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] sometime before [[33 BBY/Legends|33 BBY]]. In that year, a [[Yinchorri Uprising|serious of uprisings]] were springing up throughout the [[Yinchorri system]], a conflict which drew most of the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]] away from [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. Stationed at the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] on Coruscant at the time, the Quarren Jedi was present when a group of [[Yinchorri/Legends|Yinchorri]] [[Raid on the Jedi Temple (Yinchorri Uprising)|infiltrated]] the [[Tower of First Knowledge/Legends|Tower of First Knowledge]] in an attempt to slay the [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Jedi Initiates]] housed there. The Jedi in the Temple attacked the raiding party in force, the Quarren among their number. Successful, the invaders were repelled and the Jedi only suffered two casualties, Jedi [[Tieren Nie-Tan]] and [[Jude Rozess]].<ref name="AOW" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Quarren Jedi was created by penciller [[Davidé Fabbri]] for the [[Jedi Council: Acts of War 2|second issue]] of the [[Star Wars: Jedi Council: Acts of War|''Jedi Council: Acts of War'']] comic book arc. Depicted at the beginning of the conflict in the Jedi Temple, ''Acts of War'' was the Quarren Jedi's only appearance to date.

==Appearances==
*[[Jedi Council: Acts of War 2|''Jedi Council: Acts of War'' 2]] {{1st}}
